auth.label: Personal Access Token
auth.description: Figma personal access token sent with the X-Figma-Token header. Create or manage tokens from Figma account settings: https://www.figma.com/developers/api#access-tokens

actions.name: create_dev_resources
actions.description: Create dev resources and attach them to Figma file nodes.

name.description: The display name for the dev resource.

url.description: The URL of the dev resource.

fileKey.description: The main Figma file key from a Figma file URL.

nodeId.description: The Figma node ID to attach the dev resource to.

items.description: A Figma dev resource to create.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating Figma dev resources.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

linksCreated.description: The raw JSON array returned by the Figma API.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

linksUpdated.description: The raw JSON array returned by the Figma API.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

errors.description: The raw JSON array returned by the Figma API.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: The result of creating or updating Figma dev resources.

actions.name: delete_comment
actions.description: Delete a Figma comment created by the authenticated user.

fileKey.description: The Figma file key or branch key from a Figma file URL.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a Figma comment.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The result of deleting a Figma comment.

actions.name: delete_comment_reaction
actions.description: Delete an emoji reaction created by the authenticated user.

fileKey.description: The Figma file key or branch key from a Figma file URL.

emoji.description: The emoji reaction shortcode to add or delete.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a Figma comment reaction.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The result of deleting a Figma comment reaction.

actions.name: delete_dev_resource
actions.description: Delete a Figma dev resource from a main file.

fileKey.description: The main Figma file key from a Figma file URL.

devResourceId.description: The Figma dev resource ID to delete.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a Figma dev resource.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The result of deleting a Figma dev resource.

actions.name: get_component
actions.description: Get metadata for a published Figma component by key.

key.description: The unique Figma library asset key.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a Figma component.

item.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: A Figma library item returned by the connector.

actions.name: get_component_set
actions.description: Get metadata for a published Figma component set by key.

key.description: The unique Figma library asset key.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a Figma component set.

item.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: A Figma library item returned by the connector.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the current Figma user associated with the credential.

inputSchema.description: No input is required to get the current Figma user.

user.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: The current Figma user returned by the connector.

actions.name: get_dev_resources
actions.description: Get dev resources attached to a Figma main file.

fileKey.description: The main Figma file key from a Figma file URL.

items.description: A Figma node ID.

nodeIds.description: Figma node IDs to fetch or render, for example `1:2` or `123:456`.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading Figma dev resources.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

devResources.description: The raw JSON array returned by the Figma API.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma dev resources returned by the connector.

actions.name: get_file
actions.description: Get the JSON document for a Figma file or branch.

fileKey.description: The Figma file key or branch key from a Figma file URL.

version.description: A specific Figma file version ID to read.

items.description: A Figma node ID.

nodeIds.description: Figma node IDs to fetch or render, for example `1:2` or `123:456`.

depth.description: The maximum depth of the document tree to return from Figma.

geometry.description: Whether Figma should include vector path geometry.

items.description: A Figma plugin ID.

pluginData.description: Plugin IDs whose plugin data Figma should include.

branchData.description: Whether Figma should include branch metadata in the response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a Figma file document.

file.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma file JSON returned by the connector.

actions.name: get_file_metadata
actions.description: Get lightweight metadata for a Figma file without fetching its full document.

fileKey.description: The Figma file key or branch key from a Figma file URL.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading Figma file metadata.

metadata.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma file metadata returned by the connector.

actions.name: get_file_nodes
actions.description: Get JSON for selected node IDs from a Figma file or branch.

fileKey.description: The Figma file key or branch key from a Figma file URL.

items.description: A Figma node ID.

nodeIds.description: Figma node IDs to fetch or render, for example `1:2` or `123:456`.

version.description: A specific Figma file version ID to read.

depth.description: The maximum depth of the document tree to return from Figma.

geometry.description: Whether Figma should include vector path geometry.

items.description: A Figma plugin ID.

pluginData.description: Plugin IDs whose plugin data Figma should include.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading selected Figma nodes.

additionalProperties.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

nodes.description: Figma nodes keyed by node ID.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma node JSON returned by the connector.

actions.name: get_image_fills
actions.description: Get temporary download URLs for image fills used in a Figma file.

fileKey.description: The Figma file key or branch key from a Figma file URL.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading Figma image fill URLs.

images.description: Image fill URLs keyed by Figma image reference.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma image fill URLs returned by the connector.

actions.name: get_project_metadata
actions.description: Get metadata for a Figma project.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading Figma project metadata.

metadata.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma project metadata returned by the connector.

actions.name: get_style
actions.description: Get metadata for a published Figma style by key.

key.description: The unique Figma library asset key.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a Figma style.

item.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: A Figma library item returned by the connector.

actions.name: list_comment_reactions
actions.description: List emoji reactions on a Figma file comment.

fileKey.description: The Figma file key or branch key from a Figma file URL.

cursor.description: A pagination cursor returned by Figma.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Figma comment reactions.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

reactions.description: The raw JSON array returned by the Figma API.

pagination.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma comment reactions returned by the connector.

actions.name: list_comments
actions.description: List comments on a Figma file or branch.

fileKey.description: The Figma file key or branch key from a Figma file URL.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Figma comments.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma comments returned by the connector.

actions.name: list_file_component_sets
actions.description: List published component sets in a Figma main file library.

fileKey.description: The main Figma file key from a Figma file URL.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Figma file component sets.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.
The raw JSON array returned by the Figma API.

pagination.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma library items returned by the connector.

actions.name: list_file_components
actions.description: List published components in a Figma main file library.

fileKey.description: The main Figma file key from a Figma file URL.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Figma file components.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.
The raw JSON array returned by the Figma API.

pagination.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma library items returned by the connector.

actions.name: list_file_styles
actions.description: List published styles in a Figma main file library.

fileKey.description: The main Figma file key from a Figma file URL.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Figma file styles.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.
The raw JSON array returned by the Figma API.

pagination.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma library items returned by the connector.

actions.name: list_file_versions
actions.description: List version history records for a Figma file.

fileKey.description: The Figma file key or branch key from a Figma file URL.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of versions to request from Figma.

before.description: A pagination cursor requesting versions before this cursor.

after.description: A pagination cursor requesting versions after this cursor.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Figma file versions.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

pagination.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma file versions returned by the connector.

actions.name: list_project_files
actions.description: List files in a Figma project.

branchData.description: Whether Figma should include branch metadata for files.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Figma project files.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

files.description: The raw JSON array returned by the Figma API.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma project files returned by the connector.

actions.name: list_team_projects
actions.description: List projects visible to the authenticated user in a Figma team.

teamId.description: The Figma team ID from a Figma team URL.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Figma team projects.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

projects.description: The raw JSON array returned by the Figma API.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma projects returned by the connector.

actions.name: post_comment
actions.description: Post a comment on a Figma file or branch.

fileKey.description: The Figma file key or branch key from a Figma file URL.

clientMeta.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

commentId.description: An optional parent comment ID to reply to.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for posting a Figma comment.

comment.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: A Figma comment result returned by the connector.

actions.name: post_comment_reaction
actions.description: Add an emoji reaction to a Figma file comment.

fileKey.description: The Figma file key or branch key from a Figma file URL.

emoji.description: The emoji reaction shortcode to add or delete.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for adding a Figma comment reaction.

posted.description: Whether the reaction request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: A Figma comment reaction result.

actions.name: render_images
actions.description: Render selected Figma file nodes and return temporary image URLs.

fileKey.description: The Figma file key or branch key from a Figma file URL.

items.description: A Figma node ID.

nodeIds.description: Figma node IDs to fetch or render, for example `1:2` or `123:456`.

version.description: A specific Figma file version ID to read.

scale.description: The image scale factor supported by Figma.

format.description: The image format Figma should render.

svgIncludeId.description: Whether SVG exports should include Figma node IDs.

svgSimplifyStroke.description: Whether SVG exports should simplify inside and outside strokes.

useAbsoluteBounds.description: Whether Figma should use full node bounds when rendering.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for rendering Figma file nodes.

anyOf.description: The rendered image URL for a Figma node.

images.description: Rendered image URLs keyed by node ID. Missing or failed renders may be null.

anyOf.description: The image rendering error returned by Figma.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: Figma image rendering URLs returned by the connector.

actions.name: update_dev_resources
actions.description: Update existing Figma dev resources.

id.description: The unique Figma dev resource ID.

name.description: The new display name for the dev resource.

url.description: The new URL for the dev resource.

items.description: A Figma dev resource update. Include at least one of name or url.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating Figma dev resources.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

linksCreated.description: The raw JSON array returned by the Figma API.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

linksUpdated.description: The raw JSON array returned by the Figma API.

items.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

errors.description: The raw JSON array returned by the Figma API.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by the Figma API.

outputSchema.description: The result of creating or updating Figma dev resources.
